sql_array: CREATE TABLE timestamps (event_id INT, event_time TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO timestamps (event_id, event_time) VALUES (1, to_timestamp(1284352323.5));
UPDATE timestamps SET event_time = to_timestamp(1609459200) WHERE event_id = 1;
SELECT event_id, event_time FROM timestamps WHERE event_time > to_timestamp(1284352323);
DELETE FROM timestamps WHERE event_time < to_timestamp(1500000000);
